_meta.description: Append-only log of string key renames and deletions. The compile and import scripts use this to auto-remap translations when keys change. Never delete entries — the log is the audit trail.

fields.from: The old key that no longer exists in source
fields.to: The new key (null if the string was intentionally deleted)
fields.reason: Why the key changed — rename, promotion to wider scope, deletion, convention fix
fields.translationsCarried: Language codes whose translations were moved to the new key

migrations.reason: Migrated from flat strings.json to structured source files. Key renamed to follow element-type convention.
Migrated to scoped source file. Key renamed to follow {scope}.{element-type}.{semantic-name} convention.
Migrated to scoped source file. Key renamed to follow convention.
Promoted to common — appears across multiple page contexts.
Promoted to common — appears across multiple page contexts.
Promoted to common. Renamed to follow element-type convention.
Promoted to common. Updated to ICU plural format.
Promoted to common. Updated to ICU plural format.
Promoted to common. Key renamed to kebab-case convention.
